name: multi-device-webdav-sync
title: 多机数据共享与坚果云 WebDAV 同步
description: Multi-device data sharing via JSON backup and optional Nutstore WebDAV upload/download (parked backlog)
creator: BeHappyWsz
notes: Phase 1 (MVP) implemented 2026-07-17: core/webdav.py (zero-dep WebDAV client), sync payload build/parse in core/export.py, services/sync_service.py (config masked, test/upload/download merge|replace + auto local backup), /api/sync/* routes + WebDAVError mapping, static/js/sync.js cloud-sync modal, docs (design/CHANGELOG/README). Verification 2026-07-17: tests/test_webdav.py (17 cases, pure client + payload codec) and tests/test_sync_service.py (21 cases: SyncService orchestration — config/save/mask/empty-pw-keep, test/upload/envelope, download merge+dedup/replace+snapshot/invalid-mode, status; plus /api/sync/* routes incl. WebDAVError->ApiError mapping config/auth->400, connection->502, invalid mode/config->400). Full suite 84 green; JS checks + state.test.mjs pass. No encryption (Phase 2 optional).

meta.priority_note: P2; after current unreleased polish / releases as needed
